description.unified: Leaps and deals ??? ATK Physical DMG to enemies within range, and stuns them for [1 sec->2sec].
Deals ??? Physical DEF Physical DMG to enemies within range, knocking them back, and reduces their [Physical Defense by 30%->ATK by 24%] and ATK Spd by [65%->18%] for 4sec.
For 17sec, increases P.DEF of the 4allies with the lowest P.DEF by ???, increases their P.Block Chance by [200->140], and reduces P.DMG taken by [35%->11%].
On Block, deals ??? ATK Physical DMG in front, reduces the target's ATK by [10%->4%] for [5 sec->6sec], and increases your Physical DEF by [5%->6%]. These effects stack up to [5->4] times.

light.unified: Cooldown is reduced by [1 sec->2 sec].

dark.unified: Mana cost increases by [1000->2000], but pulls nearby enemies toward the target.

light.unified: On block, cooldown is reduced by 0.5 sec.

dark.unified: After knockback, stuns the target for 1 sec.
Physical Block Chance additionally increases by [110 (added)].

light.unified: On block, the Attack reduction effect and Physical Defense increase effect are changed to stack up to [6 (added)] times.

description.unified: [Cut Ground] reduces Cooldown by {0}% per enemy hit and increases Stun duration by [2 sec->1 sec].
[Shield Strike] reduces the P.DEF of hit enemies by [30%->25%] and their P.Crit Resist by {0} for 4 sec.
[Guardian Shield] [(added) Removes negative effects from self] and increases DEF boost by {0}%.
[Vow of Knights] recovers [{0}% (added)] of Max HP and increases the duration of own P.DEF by [3 sec (added)].

dark.unified: At the start of each battle, increases all allies' Max HP by [10%->4%]. This effect stacks up to 3 times and cannot be dispelled.

description.unified: Every 3 Skill uses, increases P.DEF of the 4allies with the lowest P.DEF by {0}% and ATK by {1}% for 15 sec.
